items.placeName: JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Resort & Spa

facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 3,402 reviews. At Bãi Khem, one of Phu Quoc's best-rated beaches.

JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Resort & Spa is not a normal hotel. Three pools. Five restaurants. A full spa. All sitting on a private stretch of beach most tourists never reach.

The architecture alone is worth the visit. Book a table at one of the restaurants even if you're not staying.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Three pools, five restaurants, private beachfront at Bãi Khem. JW Marriott Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Resort & Spa earns that 4.7 stars every single day. This is what a resort is supposed to look like.

facebook.caption:
This beach fixes burnout.

Bãi Trường stretches for miles along Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Soft sand, warm water, and enough space that you won't feel like you're on a crowded resort beach. The sunset here hits differently when you've had a long travel day.

4.3 stars across 729 reviews. People keep coming back.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
